title: store: proxy_pools with encrypted password + tests
verification: password round-trips encrypted; list/get omit plaintext; go test -count=1 green

title: store: disabled_models + custom_models + tests
verification: UNIQUE(provider,model) enforced; CRUD round-trips; go test -count=1 green

title: handlers: proxy pools CRUD/test/batch + tests
verification: responses omit password; batch parses host:port and url, per-line errors; audit rows; go test -count=1 green

title: proxy wiring into provider clients + tests
verification: outbound request uses assigned proxy (fake upstream + fake proxy listener); go test -count=1 green

title: handlers: provider detail/connections/suggested + tests
verification: detail returns matrix+counts+health; envelope+snake_case; go test -count=1 green

title: handlers: model test single/batch SSE + tests
verification: upstream failure returns {ok:false,error} not 500; batch SSE one event per connection + done; go test -count=1 green

title: disabled/custom model filtering in listing + routing + tests
verification: disabled absent from /v1/models and rejected by routing with clear error; custom appears; go test -count=1 green

title: per-phase gate + WORKFLOW + Outcome notes
verification: go test -race ./... green; coverage >= 95.0%; go build ./cmd/g0router; WORKFLOW + Outcome updated
